title: Hows EVA 01s roar
wikitext:
[]: How's EVA-01's roar?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Nov 25, 2009 8:04 pm Original '95 roar at approximately 1:10. Now I heard EVA-01's roar in the 1.0 dub trailer, and the roar sounds a little more like a generic animal. What do you think? Does the roar still have its old appeal of sounding otherworldly?

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Wed Nov 25, 2009 8:22 pm this topic sounds awfully familiar...

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Nov 25, 2009 9:42 pm Japannese 1.01: KICKASSS English 1.01: lolwut? they took the japannese audio lowered it down and added some guy growl

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 25, 2009 11:42 pm All I have to say is that the Japanese didn't think about what they were doing when they put various roars on the dialogue track, rather than the music and effects track where they belong. Discussing Eva roars... shiiii...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 26, 2009 12:01 am I thought it sounded amazing! It sounded differently then when we watched it at Otakon on that GIANT movie theater screen.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Thu Nov 26, 2009 6:47 pm When I saw it Im pretty sure it was in Imax. But I must say, the Japanese roar sounded like a windows xp being raped. The dub seemed pretty good in my opinion because it had a little bit of machine and the other bit was just straightup gruesome. In a good way, it sent shivers down my spine to really get a good feel on the animalistic side of Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Nov 26, 2009 8:41 pm Its interesting you know. At first i thought i would be pretty pissed off at Funimation for editing the Unit 01 roar. Like what ADV did with that horrendous version of their roar in their NGE english dub. But for some reason....Funimation dub's version was actually done fairly well. Now that i compare the two the Japanese dub version of Unit 01's roar sounded like some retarded fool charging in for the kill. While the Funimation english dub's Unit 01 roar ACTUALLY sounds more like a bio-mecha beast with this weird digitized robotic noise mixed in with the normal Japanese version of the roar. Kudos to Funimation for doing a good job.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Nov 27, 2009 7:47 pm Hmmm im an eva dub fan... but it would seem im the only one who liked the electronic roar. I think it fitted rather well.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Nov 27, 2009 9:00 pm You liked the electronic roar but did you think it went well with Unit 01?

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Sat Nov 28, 2009 1:59 am Actually in ADV original dub, ADV acquired the footage from the Gainax and it lacked EVA sound effects such as the Unit One growl and they had one of the guys in studio growl and used a few sound effects to make it sound otherworldly. If i recall from the commentary one was called "grumpy flutter". This was because as stated above it was on the wrong audio track. If you think the sound effects in the unit one berserk scene is bad in either series, play the N64 game, it sounds like an old man is struggling in the bathroom.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 28, 2009 2:56 am Wasn't it because the growl was in the dialogue track and not the sound effects track, which means when ADV did the English dub, they also had to redo the growl.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Nov 28, 2009 7:56 am ^- Yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Nov 28, 2009 8:29 am wonderluster wrote: You liked the electronic roar but did you think it went well with Unit 01?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Nov 28, 2009 5:20 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Nov 30, 2009 5:31 am because by that point they had enough experience making eva sounds that they actually made it sound cool lol

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Nov 30, 2009 7:46 am wonderluster wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Mon Nov 30, 2009 12:06 pm agreed

[]:             Quote Post by KnifeEyeAttack » Wed Jun 09, 2010 8:24 am Personally think the orginal 'bezerk' roar is way more harrowing and organic. The Rebuild one sounds more 'human' which coming from something like the Eva (don't bludge me on semantics here) seems just odd.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Wed Nov 2

Article: Hows EVA 01s roar
41 pm Its interesting you know. At first i thought i would be pretty pissed off at Funimation for editing the Unit 01 roar. Like what ADV did with that horrendous version of their roar in their NGE english dub. But for some reason....Funimation dub's version was actually done fairly well. Now that i compare the two the Japanese dub version of Unit 01's roar sounded like some retarded fool charging in for the kill. While the Funimation english dub's Unit 01 roar ACTUALLY sounds more like a bio-mecha beast with this weird digitized robotic noise mixed in with the normal Japanese version of the roar. Kudos to Funimation for doing a good job.

If i recall from the commentary one was called "grumpy flutter". This was because as stated above it was on the wrong audio track. If you think the sound effects in the unit one berserk scene is bad in either series, play the N64 game, it sounds like an old man is struggling in the bathroom.
